channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mediterranean Diet May Reduce Postpartum Metabolic Risk
item.description: A Mediterranean-based nutritional intervention initiated at 8-12 gestational weeks is associated with a reduced risk for metabolic syndrome 6 years po...

item.title: How Medicare is breaking nursing home care [PODCAST]
item.description: Subscribe to The Podcast by KevinMD. Watch on YouTube. Catch up on old episodes! Imagine being penalized for delivering good care to your frailest pat...

item.title: NP-Led Ward Rounds Linked to Lower Surgical Site Infections
item.description: Nurse practitioner-led ward rounds may reduce the overall incidence of surgical site infections and healthcare costs and shorten the length of hospita...

item.title: COVID-19 vaccine study that was blocked from CDC journal is published elsewhere
item.description: A study on COVID-19 vaccine effectiveness has finally been published after being blocked from a government health journal.
